description: ItsyBitsy M4 with Bitsy Expander (Connected Interaction Kit). One input: ToF distance sensor. One output: NeoPixel LED.
note: This file documents the physical setup. It is the source from which system_prompt.md is derived. In a future version of the webapp, uploading this file could auto-generate the system prompt.

distance.label: Distance sensor
distance.port: any I2C header on Bitsy Expander
notes: Values below 50mm or above 950mm are unreliable and are filtered out in firmware.
Lower value = object closer to sensor.
A clear line of sight is needed; works best with flat surfaces perpendicular to the sensor.

led.label: RGB LED
notes: R, G, B are colour channels. brightness controls overall intensity (0 = off, 255 = full).
Brightness below ~10 will appear off to the eye.
